mapper.delete: ALTER TABLE TBL_VSWITCH_PORT_FLOW DELETE WHERE TIME < #{time}
mapper.select: SELECT DOMAIN_ID as domainId,ROUND(AVG(RX_FLOW),2) as rxFlow, ROUND(AVG(RX_PACKETS),2) as rxPackets,ROUND(AVG(TX_FLOW),2) as txFlow,ROUND(AVG(TX_PACKETS),2) as txPackets,MAC as mac FROM TBL_VSWITCH_PORT_FLOW WHERE DOMAIN_ID=${domainId} AND TIME >= (SELECT MAX(TIME) FROM TBL_VSWITCH_PORT_FLOW) -${duration} GROUP BY DOMAIN_ID,MAC

SELECT T1.DOMAIN_ID as domainId, ROUND(T1.RX_FLOW + T1.TX_FLOW,2) flow, T1.TIME as time FROM TBL_VSWITCH_PORT_FLOW T1,${@com.h3c.h3cloud.performance.monitor.service.mapper.base.clickhouseMapperConstant@TBL_DOMAIN} D, (SELECT DOMAIN_ID, MAX(TIME) TIME FROM TBL_VSWITCH_PORT_FLOW GROUP BY DOMAIN_ID) T2 WHERE D.host_id =${hostId} AND D.id = T1.DOMAIN_ID AND T1.DOMAIN_ID = T2.DOMAIN_ID AND T1.TIME = T2.TIME

SELECT (tb1.RX_FLOW + tb1.TX_FLOW) as flow, tb1.DOMAIN_ID as domainId, tb2.title as title, tb1.MAC as mac, tb1.TIME as time FROM TBL_VSWITCH_PORT_FLOW tb1 join ${@com.h3c.h3cloud.performance.monitor.service.mapper.base.clickhouseMapperConstant@TBL_DOMAIN} tb2 on tb1.DOMAIN_ID=tb2.id WHERE TIME BETWEEN ${startTime} AND ${endTime} order by tb1.DOMAIN_ID, tb1.TIME asc

select b.uuid as uuid, a.MAC as mac, a.TIME as time, a.RX_FLOW as rxFlow, a.TX_FLOW as txFlow from (select TIME,MAC,RX_FLOW,TX_FLOW,DOMAIN_ID from TBL_VSWITCH_PORT_FLOW where TIME between ${startTime} and ${endTime} and CLUSTER_ID = ${clusterId}) as a join ${@com.h3c.h3cloud.performance.monitor.service.mapper.base.clickhouseMapperConstant@TBL_DOMAIN} as b on a.DOMAIN_ID=b.id order by uuid, mac, time
